content:
:wave: Hi there! **Thank you** for adding __iTranslator__ to your Discord server.

:robot: __Here are some useful commands:__
:small_orange_diamond: /help - For the bot's help.
:small_orange_diamond: /about - For general information about the bot.
:small_orange_diamond: /translate - To translate text.
:small_orange_diamond: /premium - To activate your premium subscription if you have one. The [Premium Plan](https://itranslator.app/premium) offers a higher quality and more professional translation service, with no limits!

🖥️ __You can also use the bot on the [Dashboard](https://itranslator.app/dashboard) to manage your translations and settings.__

:sparkles: You may want to set up more advanced translation features such as automatic translation (/autotranslate) and flag translation (/flagreaction).

:sos: We invite you to join the community on our [Official Discord Server](https://discord.gg/translator) for help and take a look at the [Documentation](https://docs.itranslator.app/) to make your job easier!
